Name: Pattern Recognition - PE
Text: The user wants me to group a list of interleaved hospital events into distinct cases patient journeys The data provided does not have an explicit case ID I need to infer the case ID based on attributes like patient_age patient_gender department timestamp and activity sequence

Name: Heuristic Reasoning - PE
Text: I will go through each event and look for unique combinations of static attributes Age Gender to identify potential patients Then I will check if the sequence of activities makes logical sense for a specific department or patient type
